reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio como muy pocas: excelentes instalaciones, tanto el bar/restaurante como los sanitarios (espaciosos y limpios), gran variedad de comida y bebida, excelente atención, precios accesibles. ¡Totalmente recomendable!

(Translated by Google)
A service station like few others: excellent facilities, both the bar/restaurant and the restrooms (spacious and clean), a wide variety of food and drinks, excellent service, and affordable prices. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlaGNIRFZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es la única estación de servicio en 150 km a medio camino entre Santiago y Córdoba.  Buena cafetería y sándwiches. Baños limpios? Parada obligada!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station for 150 km, halfway between Santiago and Córdoba. Good coffee and sandwiches. Clean restrooms? A must-stop!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlNmNPcl9nRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Good place to stock up.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar . Buena atención.Sólo que un poco lentos para cargar combustible. Deberían poner 2 playeros más. Hay veces que hay uno o 2 y tenés que estar horas esperando.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. Good service. They're just a bit slow at the pumps. They should add two more attendants. Sometimes there's only one or two, and you have to wait for hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbGJQQ1pnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para hacer una parada rápida sanitarios excelente .Bar cuidado con los precios son muy altos comparados con la media .se aprovechan por qué no hay otro lugar .

(Translated by Google)
Good place for a quick stop, excellent restrooms. Beware of the bar prices, they are very high compared to the average. They take advantage of the fact that there's nowhere else to go.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlZ2RpcERnEAE

reviews.comment:
No funcionaba el sistema, solo cobraban en efectivo y no cargaban los puntos de Serviclub. Una sola persona en los surtidores y una sola chica para atender adentro. Le doy 2 estrellas por la amabilidad del personal, pero por ser muy concurrido deberían poner más personal. Se pierde mucho tiempo!!

(Translated by Google)
The system wasn't working; they only accepted cash and wouldn't credit Serviclub points. There was only one person at the pumps and only one woman serving customers inside. I'm giving it two stars for the staff's friendliness, but because it's so busy, they should hire more people. It's a huge waste of time!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlanNXZkNnEAE
